query:
UPDATE users
                 SET email_verified = TRUE,
                     account_tier = CASE
                         WHEN account_tier IN ('guest', 'unverified') THEN 'verified'
                         ELSE account_tier
                     END,
                     badge_type = CASE
                         WHEN account_tier IN ('guest', 'unverified') THEN 'shield'
                         ELSE badge_type
                     END
                 WHERE id = $1
